scripts.typecheck: pnpm shared:typecheck && pnpm functions:typecheck && pnpm i18n:typecheck && pnpm app:typecheck
scripts.test: node scripts/run-tests-with-emulators.mjs --label shared pnpm --filter @cultuvilla/shared test:all --label functions pnpm --prefix functions run test:all --label mobile pnpm app:test
scripts.test:functions: node scripts/run-tests-with-emulators.mjs npm --prefix functions run test:integration
scripts.test:emulators: pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:functions
scripts.check: pnpm check:no-raw-firestore-refs && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.deploy:functions:dev: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only functions --project dev
scripts.deploy:functions:beta: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only functions --project beta
scripts.deploy:functions:prod: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only functions --project prod
scripts.deploy:hosting:dev: pnpm predeploy:hosting:dev && pnpm app:web:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only hosting --project dev
scripts.deploy:hosting:beta: pnpm predeploy:hosting:beta && pnpm app:web:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only hosting --project beta
scripts.deploy:hosting:prod: pnpm predeploy:hosting:prod && pnpm app:web:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --only hosting --project prod
scripts.deploy:all:dev: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --project dev
scripts.deploy:all:beta: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --project beta
scripts.deploy:all:prod: pnpm functions:build && bash scripts/firebase.sh deploy --project prod
scripts.test:unit: pnpm shared:test && pnpm app:test && pnpm functions:test
